testsuite.name: com.bloxbean.cardano.zeroj.usecases.nft.CircuitTest
testsuite.system-out: NFT ownership proof: VERIFIED (depth=3) NFT ownership circuit (depth=3): 4995 constraints
testsuite.system-err: WARNING: Single-party Powers of Tau generation (BLS12-381) — for DEVELOPMENT and TESTING only. Use MPC ceremony outputs (Hermez, Zcash PoT) for production. WARNING: Single-party Groth16 Phase 2 setup (BLS12-381) — for DEVELOPMENT and TESTING only. Use snarkjs multi-party ceremony for production.
